description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages testing, release, and post-release, using a Maven cache at .m2/repository keyed by the project name. In the testing stage define two jobs, test:jdk11 and test:jdk8, each using the maven:3.5-jdk-11-slim and maven:3.5-jdk-8-alpine Docker images respectively, skipping execution when the commit message contains [silent-ignore] or [maven-release-plugin]; each runs `mvn ${MAVEN_CLI_OPTS} ${MAVEN_NO_PACKAGING} verify` then an awk command to compute instruction coverage and prints the percentage. Both test jobs apply the coverage regex `/([0-9]{1,3}[.][0-9][0-9]) % covered/` and inherit a global before_script that creates the .m2/repository directory and an after_script that removes the idltool repository cache. In the release stage add a packaging job that runs only on tag pipelines, uses the maven:3.5-jdk-8-alpine image, runs a before_script to `apk update`, `apk add --no-cache git rpm`, and creates the .m2/repository directory, then executes `mvn ${MAVEN_CLI_OPTS} ${MAVEN_NO_TESTS} package` followed by moving the generated idltool tar.gz, deb, and noarch.rpm files to the project root. The packaging job publishes those three artifact files and respects the same Maven cache, while no jobs are defined for the post-release stage.
